description: Single subject (product / talent / dish) framed in warm late-afternoon natural light. Background remains in soft focus. Shallow depth-of-field anchors attention.
structural_recipe: Single subject (product / talent / dish) framed in warm late-afternoon natural light. Background remains in soft focus. Shallow depth-of-field anchors attention.
why_it_works: Universal Saudi aspirational register; works across F&B, beauty, and retail.
transplantation_caveats: Avoid if brand register is clinical / modern-cold.
